description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6 Docker image with postgres and redis services. Set a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores node_modules and web/public/jspm_packages and includes untracked files. Define a test stage and a test job that runs in the test stage, uses the docker tag, runs before_script commands npm install and npm run init, then executes npm test, and sets job-level variables DATABASE_URL, DEBUG, REDIS_URL. Also define global variables POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD for the postgres service. The job should run on runners tagged docker.
